Class FlatFileGenerator.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.bloviate.file.FlatFileGenerator.Builder
Enclosing class:
FlatFileGenerator
public static class FlatFileGenerator.Builder extends Object
Builds a FlatFileGenerator, defaulting to CSV output and 1000 rows with no columns.
Author:
Tim Veil

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Builder(String fileName)
    Creates a builder for the given base output file name (the extension is added per output format).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    add(ColumnDefinition columnDefinition)
    Appends a single column definition to the existing list of columns.
    FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    addAll(List<ColumnDefinition> columnDefinitions)
    Replaces the column definitions with the supplied list.
    FlatFileGenerator
    build()
    Builds a new FlatFileGenerator from this builder's configuration.
    FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    output(FileDefinition fileDefinition)
    Sets the output file format definition.
    FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    rows(long rows)
    Sets the number of data rows to generate, excluding the header row.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(String fileName)
      Creates a builder for the given base output file name (the extension is added per output format).
      Parameters:
      fileName - the base file name, without extension

  • Method Details

    • output

      public FlatFileGenerator.Builder output(FileDefinition fileDefinition)
      Sets the output file format definition. Defaults to CsvFile (CSV output) when not specified.
      Parameters:
      fileDefinition - the file format definition controlling the delimiter and extension
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • addAll

      public FlatFileGenerator.Builder addAll(List<ColumnDefinition> columnDefinitions)
      Replaces the column definitions with the supplied list. The columns are written in the order given, one delimited field per column.
      Parameters:
      columnDefinitions - the column definitions to use
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • add

      public FlatFileGenerator.Builder add(ColumnDefinition columnDefinition)
      Appends a single column definition to the existing list of columns.
      Parameters:
      columnDefinition - the column definition to append
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • rows

      public FlatFileGenerator.Builder rows(long rows)
      Sets the number of data rows to generate, excluding the header row. Defaults to 1000 when not specified.
      Parameters:
      rows - the number of data rows to write
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • build

      public FlatFileGenerator build()
      Builds a new FlatFileGenerator from this builder's configuration.
      Returns:
      a configured FlatFileGenerator

Bloviate API Reference · bloviate.io
